reviews.comment:
El ACA siempre es bueno.. esté donde esté. Éste no es la excepción.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA is always good... wherever it is. This one is no exception.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Excelentes empleados muy buen lugar y precios..limpieza de primera en toda la estación en especial los baños

(Translated by Google)
Excellent employees, very good location and prices... top-notch cleanliness throughout the station, especially the bathrooms.

(Translated by Google)
The employees are polite and helpful; good hygiene on the premises.

reviews.comment:
Te atienden cuando quieren los pibes de la YPF, si no tienen ganas no salen o te dicen que ya cerraron hace 10 minutos, tenés que ir de día nomás

(Translated by Google)
The YPF kids serve you whenever they want, if they don't want to, they don't leave or they tell you they closed 10 minutes ago, you just have to go during the day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcmR1amJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y cordialidad. Funciona todo, algo no muy común en las estaciones de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and friendliness. Everything works, which is not very common at gas stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdHN1QVVnEAE
